testcase.name: WASM renderer initializes successfully
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 DIAGNOSTICS: { rendererType: [32m'js'[39m, metrics: { fps: [33m0[39m, frameTime: [33m0[39m, agentCount: [33m0[39m, isWASM: [33mfalse[39m }, timestamp: [32m'2026-05-29T19:41:06.654Z'[39m } CONSOLE MESSAGES: [] WASM path fell back to JS Canvas2D (expected in CI without GPU) [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 967 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 217

testcase.name: WASM renderer loads single shader without errors
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 967 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 217 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos

testcase.name: WASM renderer loads multiple shaders (multi-slot stack)
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 967 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 217 [BROWSER log] ✅ JSRenderer: Image loaded 1024x1024

testcase.name: WASM renderer handles shader loading with minimal console errors
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 967 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 217

testcase.name: WASM renderer collects performance metrics
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3) [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 967 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 217 === WASM Renderer Metrics === FPS: undefined Init Time: undefined Has Module: undefined ============================== Skipping WASM performance metric assertions because renderer fell back to undefined
